NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL.description: Public URL of your application (e.g., https://your-app.vercel.app)

DATABASE_DIRECT_URL.description: Direct PostgreSQL connection string for Prisma migrations

ALLOWED_ORIGINS.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins (e.g., https://your-app.vercel.app,https://customdomain.com)

STORAGE_PROVIDER.description: Storage provider: local, r2, or s3

REDIS_URL.description: Redis connection URL for session storage (optional but recommended for production)

CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID.description: Cloudflare Account ID for R2 storage (if using R2)

CLOUDFLARE_R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID.description: Cloudflare R2 Access Key ID (if using R2)

CLOUDFLARE_R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY.description: Cloudflare R2 Secret Access Key (if using R2)

CLOUDFLARE_R2_BUCKET.description: Cloudflare R2 Bucket name (if using R2)

AWS_REGION.description: AWS Region for S3 (if using S3)

AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID.description: AWS Access Key ID (if using S3)

AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY.description: AWS Secret Access Key (if using S3)

AWS_S3_BUCKET.description: AWS S3 Bucket name (if using S3)
